description_long: This is a single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic taildragger configuration. The airplane features a dark, glossy paint scheme with bold red and yellow accents, including a large number '6' on the nose and wing surfaces. The wings are straight and slightly tapered, with no visible winglets, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, all of which are fixed and non-retractable. The exterior is primarily metal, likely aluminum, with some painted and possibly composite elements, and the propeller is mounted at the nose.
description: A sleek, single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a dark, glossy finish, bold markings, and a classic taildragger landing gear. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, straight wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, bold markings, and the detailed artwork on the fuselage side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the propeller, cockpit placement, and the taildragger landing gear configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight, slightly tapered wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a single fixed tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
